models.upscayl-standard-4x: Standard — Balanced speed and quality. Good default.
models.ultrasharp-4x: UltraSharp — Maximum detail. Best for live-action footage.
models.remacri-4x: Remacri — Smooth, natural look. Good for portraits.
models.digital-art-4x: Digital Art — Optimized for illustrations and digital art.
models.high-fidelity-4x: High Fidelity — Faithful reproduction with minimal artifacts.
models.upscayl-lite-4x: Lite — Fastest. Lower quality, good for previews/drafts.
